flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University at Buffalo rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.1k → $7.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University at Buffalo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
